name: AvePoint, Inc.
description: AvePoint, Inc. provides a cloud-based data management platform worldwide. The company offers a suite of SaaS solutions to migrate, manage, and protect data in Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and Salesforce. Its platform enables organizations to secure digital collaboration, automate IT operations, and ensure data compliance and governance. AvePoint serves customers across various sectors, including public sector, financial services, healthcare, and education.
